title: neomolinia koryoensis
intro: Neomolinia koryoensis, also known as Korean wormwood, is a plant species native to Korea, belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Neomolinia koryoensis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and supplements.
